title: Error reading properties of null in Rest API
symptom: When attempting to use the Rest API to fetch data, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' occurs, indicating a potential issue with the data structure being returned.
applies_when: Using Rest API to fetch data
not_this_if: API response is valid and contains expected data
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the code attempts to access properties of an object that is null. In this case, it suggests that the API response may not be structured as expected, possibly due to a corrupted collection or misconfiguration in the API setup.
fix_steps: Add a header and a query string to the API request
Remove the header and query string
Test the API request again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Modify the API request by adding and then removing a header and query string, then retest the request.
